Codex final message:
`hushline/static/js/directory_verified.js` is already modified in your workspace and no longer matches `HEAD` or `assets/js/directory_verified.js`. The app serves that static file, so implementing this issue cleanly requires either:

1. Replacing the current local static bundle with the normal checked-in source copy and then applying the count change there too.
2. Leaving the bundled local file intact and patching inside the generated bundle.

`HEAD` has the plain source version, so option 1 is the sane fix, but it would overwrite the existing local change in that file. Which path do you want?

<a href=\\"${user.profile_url}\\" aria-label=\\"View read-only listing for ${user.display_name}\\">View Listing</a>\\n        </div>\\n      </article>\\n    `;\\n  }\\n\\n  function </div>\\n      </article>\\n    `;\\n  }\\n\\n  function appendSection(panel, label, users, query, tab) {\\n    if (!users.length) {\\n      return;\\n    }\\n\\n    if (label) {\\n      const }\\n\\n    const userListContainer = document.createElement(\\"div\\");\\n    userListContainer.className = \\"user-list\\";\\n    userListContainer.innerHTML = users.map((user) => buildUserCard(user, }\\n\\n    const submitButton = attorneyFiltersPanel.querySelector(\'button[type=\\"submit\\"]\');\\n    if (submitButton) {\\n      submitButton.disabled = isLoading;\\n    }\\n\\n    const resetLink userSearch.matchesQuery(searchText, normalizedQuery);\n    });\n  }\n\n  function highlightMatch(text, query) {\n    return userSearch.highlightQuery(text || \"\", query);\n  }\n\n  function sortedByDisplayName(entries) {\n    return [...entries].sort((a, b) =>\n      (a.display_name || \"\").localeCompare(b.display_name || \"\", undefined, {\n        sensitivity: \"base\",\n      }),\n    );\n  }\n\n  function buildBadges(user, tab) {\n    let badgeContainer = \"\";\n\n    if (user.is_public_record) {\n      if (tab === \"all\") {\n        badgeContainer +=\n          '<span class=\"badge\" role=\"img\" aria-label=\"Attorney listing\">⚖️ Attorney</span>';\n      }\n      if (user.is_automated) {\n        badgeContainer +=\n          '<span class=\"badge\" role=\"img\"        '<span class=\"badge\" role=\"img\" aria-label=\"SecureDrop listing\">🛡️ SecureDrop</span>';\n      }\n      if (user.is_automated) {\n        badgeContainer +=\n          '<span       '<span class=\"badge\" role=\"img\" aria-label=\"Automated listing\">🤖 Automated</span>';\n      }\n      return badgeContainer;\n    }\n\n    if (user.is_admin) {\n      badgeContainer +=\n        '<span class=\"badge\" role=\"img\" aria-label=\"Administrator account\">⚙️ Admin</span>';\n    }\n\n    if (user.is_verified) {\n      badgeContainer +=\n        '<span class=\"badge\" highlightMatch(user.display_name, query);\n    const bioHighlighted = user.bio ? highlightMatch(user.bio, query) : \"\";\n    let listingType = \"SecureDrop listing\";\n    if (user.is_public_record) {\n      listingType = \"Public record listing\";\n    } else if (user.is_globaleaks) {\n      listingType = \"GlobaLeaks listing\";\n    }\n\n    return `\n      <article class=\"user\" tab) {\n    const displayNameHighlighted = highlightMatch(\n      user.display_name || user.primary_username,\n      query,\n    );\n    const usernameHighlighted = highlightMatch(user.primary_username, query);\n    const bioHighlighted = user.bio ? highlightMatch(user.bio, query) : \"\";\n\n    if (user.is_public_record || user.is_globaleaks || `${isVerified} admin user` : `${isVerified} User`;\n    const badges = buildBadges(user, tab);\n\n    return `\n      <article class=\"user\" aria-label=\"${userType}, Display name:${user.display_name || user.primary_username}, Username: ${user.primary_username}, Bio: ${user.bio || \"No bio\"}\">\n        <h3>${displayNameHighlighted}</h3>\n        <p class=\"meta\">@${usernameHighlighted}</p>\n        ${badges ? `<div class=\"badgeContainer\">${badges}</div>` : \"\"}\n        ${bioHighlighted ? `<p class=\"bio\">${bioHighlighted}</p>` : \"\"}\n        <div class=\"user-actions\">\n          <a href=\"${user.profile_url}\" aria-label=\"${user.display_name || user.primary_username}'s profile\">View Profile</a>\n        </div>\n      </article>\n    `;\n  }\n\n  function appendSection(panel, label, users, query, tab) {\n    if (!users.length) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (label) {\n      const sectionLabel = document.createElement(\"p\");\n      sectionLabel.className = \"label searchLabel\";\n      sectionLabel.textContent = label;\n      panel.appendChild(sectionLabel);\n    }\n\n    const userListContainer = document.createElement(\"div\");\n    userListContainer.className = \"user-list\";\n    userListContainer.innerHTML = users.map((user) => buildUserCard(user, query, tab)).join(\"\");\n    panel.appendChild(userListContainer);\n  }\n\n  function renderPanelContent(\n    panel,\n    users,\n    query,\n    tab,\n    { introMarkup = \"\", showEmptyMessage = true } = {},\n  ) {\n    panel.innerHTML = introMarkup;\n\n    if (users.length === 0) {\n      if (showEmptyMessage) {\n        panel.insertAdjacentHTML(\n          \"beforeend\",\n          '<p class=\"empty-message\"><span class=\"emoji-message\">🫥</span><br>No users found.</p>',\n        );\n      }\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const realUsers = users.filter(\n      (user) => !user.is_public_record && !user.is_globaleaks && !user.is_securedrop,\n    );\n    const withPgp = realUsers.filter((user) => user.has_pgp_key);\n    const infoOnly = realUsers.filter((user) => !user.has_pgp_key);\n\n    if (tab === \"all\") {\n      appendSection(panel, \"\", sortedByDisplayName(users), query, tab);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (tab === \"verified\") {\n      appendSection(panel, \"\", withPgp, query, tab);\n      appendSection(panel, \"📇 Info-Only Accounts\", infoOnly, query, tab);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    appendSection(panel, \"\", users, query, tab);\n  }\n\n  function displayUsers(users, query) {\n    const panel = activePanel();\n    const tab = activeTabName();\n    if (!panel) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    renderPanelContent(panel, users, query, tab);\n  }\n\n  function buildDefaultPanelMarkup(tab) {\n    const panel = document.createElement(\"div\");\n    const introMarkup = tab === \"public-records\" ? publicRecordsIntroMarkup : \"\";\n    const showEmptyMessage = tab !== \"public-records\";\n\n panel.innerHTML = initialMarkup.get(panel.id);\n      }\n      if (hasRenderedSearch) {\n        setSearchStatus(`Showing all ${currentScopeLabel}.`);\n      }\n      hasRenderedSearch = false;\n ${currentScopeLabel.slice(0, -1)} matching \"${query}\".`\n        : `Found ${filteredUsers.length} ${currentScopeLabel} matching \"${query}\".`,\n    );\n    hasRenderedSearch = true;\n  }\n\n  function buildAttorneyFilterSearch() {\n    const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);\n    const country = attorneyCountryFilter?.value.trim() || \"\";\n    const region = attorneyRegionFilter?.value.trim() || \"\";\n\n    if (country) {\n      params.set(\"country\", country);\n    } else {\n      params.delete(\"country\");\n    }\n\n    if (region) {\n applyAttorneyFiltersFromSearch(search) {\n    if (!attorneyCountryFilter || !attorneyRegionFilter) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const params = new URLSearchParams(search);\n    attorneyCountryFilter.value = params.get(\"country\") || \"\";\n    attorneyRegionFilter.value = params.get(\"region\") || \"\";\n    updateAttorneyRegionOptions();\n\n    if (attorneyFiltersPanel) {\n      attorneyFiltersPanel.hidden = !(attorneyCountryFilter.value || attorneyRegionFilter.value);\n      updateAttorneyFiltersToggle();\n    }\n  }\n\n  function isLoading ? \"true\" : \"false\");\n\n    if (attorneyCountryFilter) {\n      attorneyCountryFilter.disabled = isLoading;\n    }\n\n    if (attorneyRegionFilter) {\n      const disabledByCountry = attorneyRegionFilter.dataset.disabledByCountry === \"true\";\n      attorneyRegionFilter.disabled = isLoading || disabledByCountry;\n    }\n\n    const submitButton = attorneyFiltersPanel.querySelector('button[type=\"submit\"]');\n    if (submitButton) {\n      submitButton.disabled = isLoading;\n    }\n\n    const resetLink = attorneyFiltersPanel.querySelector(\"a\");\n    if (resetLink) {\n      resetLink.setAttribute(\"aria-disabled\", isLoading ? \"true\" : \"false\");\n      resetLink.tabIndex = isLoading ? -1 : 0;\n    }\n  }\n\n  function updateAttorneyRegionOptions() {\n    if (!attorneyCountryFilter || !attorneyRegionFilter) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const selectedCountry = attorneyCountryFilter.value;\n    const selectedRegion = attorneyRegionFilter.value;\n    const availableRegions = Array.isArray(attorneyFilterMetadata.regions?.[selectedCountry])\n      ? attorneyFilterMetadata.regions[selectedCountry]\n      : [];\n\n    attorneyRegionFilter.innerHTML = '<option value=\"\">All</option>';\n\n    availableRegions.forEach((region) => {\n      const attorneyRegionFilter.disabled = attorneyFiltersLoading || disabledByCountry;\n  }\n\n  function ensureAttorneyFilterMetadata() {\n    if (!attorneyCountryFilter || !attorneyRegionFilter) {\n attorneyFilterMetadataRequest = null;\n        console.error(\"Failed to load attorney filter metadata:\", error);\n        return null;\n      });\n\n    return attorneyFilterMetadataRequest;\n  }\n\n  function setDirectoryUrl(search) {\n    window.history.replaceState(\n      {},\n      \"\",\n      `${window.location.pathname}${search}${window.location.hash}`,\n    );\n  }\n\n  function loadData(search = window.location.search, options = {}) {\n    const requestOptions = {};\n    if (options.signal) {\n      requestOptions.signal = options.signal;\n    }\n\n    return fetch(`${pathPrefix}/directory/users.json${search}`, requestOptions)\n      .then((response) => {\n        if (!response.ok) {\n          throw new Error(\"Network response was not ok\");\n        }\n   });\n  }\n\n  function requestDirectoryData(search = window.location.search, options = {}) {\n    const { showAttorneyFilterLoadingState = false } = options;\n\n    if (directoryDataRequestController) {\n      directoryDataRequestController.abort();\n    }\n\n    const controller = new AbortController();\n    directoryDataRequestController = controller;\n\n    if (showAttorneyFilterLoadingState) {\n      setAttorneyFiltersLoadingState(true);\n    }\n\n    return loadData(search, { signal: controller.signal }).finally(() => {\n      if (directoryDataRequestController === controller) {\n        directoryDataRequestController = null;\n        if (showAttorneyFilterLoadingState) {\n          setAttorneyFiltersLoadingState(false);\n .matches;\n        window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: prefersReducedMotion ? \"auto\" : \"smooth\" });\n        return;\n      }\n\n      window.activateTab(clickedTab);\n    });\n !attorneyFiltersPanel) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const isExpanded = !attorneyFiltersPanel.hidden;\n    attorneyFiltersToggle.setAttribute(\"aria-expanded\", isExpanded ? \"true\" : \"false\");\n searchInput.placeholder = \"Search SecureDrop instances...\";\n      return;\n    }\n\n    searchInput.placeholder = \"Search directory...\";\n  }\n\n  function scopeLabel() {\n    const activeTab = === \"globaleaks\") {\n      return \"GlobaLeaks instances\";\n    }\n\n    if (activeTab === \"securedrop\") {\n      return \"SecureDrop instances\";\n    }\n\n    return \"directory entries\";\n  }\n\n  function matchesTab(user, tab) {\n    if (\n      tab === \"verified\" &&\n      (!user.is_verified || user.is_public_record || user.is_globaleaks || user.is_securedrop)\n    ) {\n      return false;\n    }\n\n    if (tab === \"public-records\" && !user.is_public_record) {\n      return false;\n    }\n\n    if (tab === \"globaleaks\" && !user.is_globaleaks) {\n      return false;\n    }\n\n    if (tab === \"securedrop\" && !user.is_securedrop) {\n      return false;\n    }\n\n    return true;\n  }\n\n  function filterUsers(query, tab = activeTabName()) {\n    const normalizedQuery = query.trim().toLowerCase();\n\n    return userData.filter((user) => {\n      if (!matchesTab(user, tab)) {\n        return false;\n      }\n\n      if (normalizedQuery === \"\") {\n        return true;\n      }\n\n      const countries = Array.isArray(user.countries) ? user.countries.join(\" \") : \"\";\n      const searchText = userSearch.normalizeSearchText([\n        user.primary_username,\n        user.display_name,\n        user.bio,\n        user.city,\n        user.country,\n        user.subdivision,\n        countries,\n      ]);\n      return userSearch.matchesQuery(searchText, normalizedQuery);\n    });\n  }\n\n  function highlightMatch(text, query) {\n    return userSearch.highlightQuery(text || \"\", query);\n  }\n\n  function sortedByDisplayName(entries) {\n    return [...entries].sort((a, b) =>\n      (a.display_name || \"\").localeCompare(b.display_name || \"\", undefined, {\n        sensitivity: \"base\",\n      }),\n    );\n  }\n\n  function buildBadges(user, tab) {\n    let badgeContainer = \"\";\n\n    if (user.is_public_record) {\n      if (tab === \"all\") {\n        badgeContainer +=\n          '<span class=\"badge\" role=\"img\" aria-label=\"Attorney listing\">⚖️ Attorney</span>';\n      }\n      if (user.is_automated) {\n        badgeContainer +=\n          '<span class=\"badge\" role=\"img\" aria-label=\"Automated listing\">🤖 Automated</span>';\n      }\n      return badgeContainer;\n    }\n\n    if (user.is_securedrop) {\n      if (tab !== \"securedrop\") {\n        badgeContainer +=\n          '<span class=\"badge\" role=\"img\" aria-label=\"SecureDrop listing\">🛡️ SecureDrop</span>';\n      }\n      if (user.is_automated) {\n        badgeContainer +=\n          '<span class=\"badge\" role=\"img\" aria-label=\"Automated listing\">🤖 Automated</span>';\n      }\n      return badgeContainer;\n    }\n\n    if (user.is_globaleaks) {\n      if (tab !== \"globaleaks\") {\n        badgeContainer +=\n          '<span class=\"badge\" role=\"img\" aria-label=\"GlobaLeaks listing\">🌐 GlobaLeaks</span>';\n      }\n      if (user.is_automated) {\n        badgeContainer +=\n          '<span class=\"badge\" role=\"img\" aria-label=\"Automated listing\">🤖 Automated</span>';\n      }\n      return badgeContainer;\n    }\n\n    if (user.is_admin) {\n      badgeContainer +=\n        '<span class=\"badge\" role=\"img\" aria-label=\"Administrator account\">⚙️ Admin</span>';\n    }\n\n    if (user.is_verified) {\n      badgeContainer +=\n        '<span class=\"badge\" aria-label=\"Info-only account\">📇 Info Only</span>';\n    }\n\n    return badgeContainer;\n  }\n\n  function buildAutomatedListingCard(user, query, tab) {\n    const displayNameHighlighted = highlightMatch(user.display_name, query);\n    const bioHighlighted = user.bio ? highlightMatch(user.bio, query) : \"\";\n    let listingType = \"SecureDrop listing\";\n    if (user.is_public_record) {\n      listingType = \"Public record listing\";\n    } else if (user.is_globaleaks) {\n      listingType = \"GlobaLeaks listing\";\n    }\n\n    return `\n      <article class=\"user\" href=\"${user.profile_url}\" aria-label=\"View read-only listing for ${user.display_name}\">View Listing</a>\n        </div>\n      </article>\n    `;\n  }\n\n  function buildUserCard(user, query, tab) {\n    const displayNameHighlighted = highlightMatch(\n      user.display_name || user.primary_username,\n      query,\n    );\n    const usernameHighlighted = highlightMatch(user.primary_username, query);\n    const bioHighlighted = user.bio ? highlightMatch(user.bio, query) : \"\";\n\n    if (user.is_public_record || user.is_globaleaks || user.is_securedrop) {\n      return buildAutomatedListingCard(user, query, tab);\n    }\n\n    const isVerified = user.is_verified ? \"Verified\" : \"\";\n    const userType = user.is_admin ?     ${badges ? `<div class=\"badgeContainer\">${badges}</div>` : \"\"}\n        ${bioHighlighted ? `<p class=\"bio\">${bioHighlighted}</p>` : \"\"}\n        <div class=\"user-actions\">\n          <a href=\"${user.profile_url}\" aria-label=\"${user.display_name || user.primary_username}'s profile\">View Profile</a>\n        </div>\n      </article>\n    `;\n  }\n\n  function appendSection(panel, label, users, query, tab) {\n    if (!users.length) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (label) {\n      const sectionLabel = document.createElement(\"p\");\n      sectionLabel.className = \"label userListContainer.className = \"user-list\";\n    userListContainer.innerHTML = users.map((user) => buildUserCard(user, query, tab)).join(\"\");\n    panel.appendChild(userListContainer);\n  }\n\n  function renderPanelContent(\n    panel,\n    users,\n    query,\n    tab,\n    { introMarkup = \"\", showEmptyMessage = true } = {},\n  ) {\n    panel.innerHTML = introMarkup;\n\n    if (users.length === 0) {\n      if (showEmptyMessage) {\n        panel.insertAdjacentHTML(\n          \"beforeend\",\n          '<p class=\"empty-message\"><span class=\"emoji-message\">🫥</span><br>No users withPgp = realUsers.filter((user) => user.has_pgp_key);\n    const infoOnly = realUsers.filter((user) => !user.has_pgp_key);\n\n    if (tab === \"all\") {\n      appendSection(panel, \"\", sortedByDisplayName(users), query, tab);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (tab === \"verified\") {\n      appendSection(panel, \"\", withPgp, query, tab);\n      appendSection(panel, \"📇 Info-Only Accounts\", infoOnly, query, tab);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    appendSection(panel, \"\", users, query, tab);\n  }\n\n  function displayUsers(users, query) {\n    const panel = activePanel();\n    const tab = activeTabName();\n    if (!panel) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    renderPanelContent(panel, users, query, tab);\n  }\n\n  function buildDefaultPanelMarkup(tab) {\n    const panel = document.createElement(\"div\");\n    const introMarkup = tab === \"public-records\" ? publicRecordsIntroMarkup : \"\";\n    const showEmptyMessage = tab !== \"public-records\";\n\n    renderPanelContent(panel, filterUsers(\"\", tab), \"\", tab, {\n      introMarkup,\n      showEmptyMessage,\n    });\n\n    return panel.innerHTML;\n  }\n\n  function refreshInitialMarkup() {\n    if (document.getElementById(\"public-records\")) {\n      initialMarkup.set(\"public-records\", buildDefaultPanelMarkup(\"public-records\"));\n    }\n\n    if (document.getElementById(\"all\")) {\n      initialMarkup.set(\"all\", buildDefaultPanelMarkup(\"all\"));\n    }\n  }\n\n  function handleSearchInput() {\n    const query = searchInput.value.trim();\n    const panel = activePanel();\n    const currentScopeLabel = scopeLabel();\n    const hasQuery = query.length > 0;\n\n    if (clearIcon) {\n      clearIcon.style.visibility = hasQuery ? \"visible\" : \"hidden\";\n      clearIcon.hidden = !hasQuery;\n      clearIcon.setAttribute(\"aria-hidden\", hasQuery ? \"false\" : \"true\");\n    }\n\n    if (query.length === 0) {\n      if (panel && initialMarkup.has(panel.id)) {\n        panel.innerHTML = initialMarkup.get(panel.id);\n      }\n      if (hasRenderedSearch) {\n        setSearchStatus(`Showing all ${currentScopeLabel}.`);\n      }\n      hasRenderedSearch = false;\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const filteredUsers = filterUsers(query);\n    displayUsers(filteredUsers, query);\n    setSearchStatus(\n      filteredUsers.length === 1\n        ? `Found 1 ${currentScopeLabel.slice(0, -1)} matching \"${query}\".`\n        : `Found ${filteredUsers.length} ${currentScopeLabel} matching \"${query}\".`,\n    );\n    hasRenderedSearch = true;\n  }\n\n  function buildAttorneyFilterSearch() {\n    const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);\n    const country = attorneyCountryFilter?.value.trim() || \"\";\n    const region = attorneyRegionFilter?.value.trim() || \"\";\n\n    if (country) {\n      params.set(\"country\", country);\n    } else {\n      params.delete(\"country\");\n    }\n\n    if (region) {\n      params.set(\"region\", region);\n    } else {\n      params.delete(\"region\");\n    }\n\n    const nextSearch = params.toString();\n    return nextSearch ? `?${nextSearch}` : \"\";\n  }\n\n  function applyAttorneyFiltersFromSearch(search) {\n    if (!attorneyCountryFilter || !attorneyRegionFilter) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const params = new URLSearchParams(search);\n    attorneyCountryFilter.value = params.get(\"country\") || \"\";\n    attorneyRegionFilter.value = params.get(\"region\") || \"\";\n    updateAttorneyRegionOptions();\n\n    if (attorneyFiltersPanel) {\n      attorneyFiltersPanel.hidden = !(attorneyCountryFilter.value || attorneyRegionFilter.value);\n      updateAttorneyFiltersToggle();\n    }\n  }\n\n  function setAttorneyFiltersLoadingState(isLoading) {\n    if (!attorneyFiltersPanel) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    attorneyFiltersLoading = isLoading;\n    attorneyFiltersPanel.setAttribute(\"aria-busy\", isLoading ? \"true\" : \"false\");\n\n    if (attorneyCountryFilter) {\n      attorneyCountryFilter.disabled = isLoading;\n    }\n\n    if (attorneyRegionFilter) {\n      const disabledByCountry = attorneyRegionFilter.dataset.disabledByCountry === \"true\";\n      attorneyRegionFilter.disabled = isLoading || disabledByCountry;\n    }\n\n    const submitButton = attorneyFiltersPanel.querySelector('button[type=\"submit\"]');\n    if (submitButton) {\n      submitButton.disabled = isLoading;\n    }\n\n    const resetLink = attorneyFiltersPanel.querySelector(\"a\");\n    if (resetLink) {\n      resetLink.setAttribute(\"aria-disabled\", isLoading ? \"true\" : \"false\");\n      resetLink.tabIndex = isLoading ? -1 : 0;\n    }\n  }\n\n  function updateAttorneyRegionOptions() {\n    if (!attorneyCountryFilter || !attorneyRegionFilter) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const selectedCountry = attorneyCountryFilter.value;\n    const selectedRegion = attorneyRegionFilter.value;\n    const availableRegions = Array.isArray(attorneyFilterMetadata.regions?.[selectedCountry])\n      ? attorneyFilterMetadata.regions[selectedCountry]\n      : [];\n\n    attorneyRegionFilter.innerHTML = '<option value=\"\">All</option>';\n\n    availableRegions.forEach((region) => {\n      const option = document.createElement(\"option\");\n      option.value = region.code;\n      option.textContent = region.label;\n      if (region.code === selectedRegion) {\n        option.selected = true;\n      }\n      attorneyRegionFilter.appendChild(option);\n    });\n\n    if (!availableRegions.some((region) => region.code === selectedRegion)) {\n      attorneyRegionFilter.value = \"\";\n    }\n\n    const disabledByCountry = !(selectedCountry && availableRegions.length);\n    attorneyRegionFilter.dataset.disabledByCountry = disabledByCountry ? \"true\" : \"false\";\n    attorneyRegionFilter.disabled = attorneyFiltersLoading || disabledByCountry;\n  }\n\n  function ensureAttorneyFilterMetadata() {\n    if (!attorneyCountryFilter || !attorneyRegionFilter) {\n      return Promise.resolve(null);\n    }\n\n    if (attorneyFilterMetadataRequest) {\n      return attorneyFilterMetadataRequest;\n    }\n\n    attorneyFilterMetadataRequest = fetch(`${pathPrefix}/directory/attorney-filters.json`)\n      .then((response) => {\n        if (!response.ok) {\n          throw new Error(\"Network response was not ok\");\n        }\n        return response.json();\n      })\n      .then((data) => {\n        attorneyFilterMetadata = data;\n        updateAttorneyRegionOptions();\n        return data;\n      })\n      .catch((error) => {\n        attorneyFilterMetadataRequest = null;\n        console.error(\"Failed to load attorney filter metadata:\", error);\n        return null;\n      });\n\n    return attorneyFilterMetadataRequest;\n  }\n\n  function setDirectoryUrl(search) {\n    window.history.replaceState(\n      {},\n      \"\",\n      `${window.location.pathname}${search}${window.location.hash}`,\n    );\n  }\n\n  function loadData(search = window.location.search, options = {}) {\n    const requestOptions = {};\n    if (options.signal) {\n      requestOptions.signal = options.signal;\n    }\n\n    return fetch(`${pathPrefix}/directory/users.json${search}`, requestOptions)\n      .then((response) => {\n        if (!response.ok) {\n          throw new Error(\"Network response was not ok\");\n        }\n        return response.json();\n      })\n      .then((data) => {\n        userData = data;\n        loadedDirectorySearch = search;\n        refreshInitialMarkup();\n        handleSearchInput();\n      });\n  }\n\n  function requestDirectoryData(search = window.location.search, options = {}) {\n    const { showAttorneyFilterLoadingState = false } = options;\n\n    if (directoryDataRequestController) {\n      directoryDataRequestController.abort();\n    }\n\n    const controller = new AbortController();\n    directoryDataRequestController = controller;\n\n    if (showAttorneyFilterLoadingState) {\n      setAttorneyFiltersLoadingState(true);\n    }\n\n    return loadData(search, { signal: controller.signal }).finally(() => {\n      if (directoryDataRequestController === controller) {\n        directoryDataRequestController = null;\n        if (showAttorneyFilterLoadingState) {\n          setAttorneyFiltersLoadingState(false);\n        }\n      }\n    });\n  }\n\n  async function refreshAttorneyResults() {\n    if (!attorneyFiltersPanel) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const nextSearch = buildAttorneyFilterSearch();\n    if (attorneyFiltersLoading || loadedDirectorySearch === nextSearch) {\n      return;\n    }\n    setSearchStatus(\"Updating attorney results.\");\n    setDirectoryUrl(nextSearch);\n\n    try {\n      await requestDirectoryData(nextSearch, { showAttorneyFilterLoadingState: true });\n      if (!searchInput.value.trim()) {\n        setSearchStatus(\"Attorney results updated.\");\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      if (error.name === \"AbortError\") {\n        return;\n      }\n\n      setDirectoryUrl(loadedDirectorySearch);\n      applyAttorneyFiltersFromSearch(loadedDirectorySearch);\n      setSearchStatus(\"Unable to update attorney results.\");\n      console.error(\"Failed to update attorney results:\", error);\n    }\n  }\n\n  if (searchInput) {\n    searchInput.addEventListener(\"input\", handleSearchInput);\n  }\n\n  if (clearIcon) {\n    clearIcon.addEventListener(\"click\", function () {\n      if (!searchInput) {\n        return;\n      }\n\n      searchInput.value = \"\";\n      clearIcon.style.visibility = \"hidden\";\n      clearIcon.hidden = true;\n      clearIcon.setAttribute(\"aria-hidden\", \"true\");\n      handleSearchInput();\n    });\n  }\n\n  if (attorneyFiltersToggle && attorneyFiltersPanel) {\n    updateAttorneyFiltersToggle();\n    attorneyFiltersToggle.addEventListener(\"click\", function () {\n      attorneyFiltersPanel.hidden = !attorneyFiltersPanel.hidden;\n      updateAttorneyFiltersToggle();\n    });\n  }\n\n  if (attorneyFiltersPanel && attorneyCountryFilter && attorneyRegionFilter) {\n    const resetLink = attorneyFiltersPanel.querySelector(\"a\");\n\n    attorneyFiltersPanel.addEventListener(\"submit\", function (event) {\n      event.preventDefault();\n      void refreshAttorneyResults();\n    });\n\n    attorneyCountryFilter.addEventListener(\"change\", async function () {\n      await ensureAttorneyFilterMetadata();\n      updateAttorneyRegionOptions();\n      void refreshAttorneyResults();\n    });\n\n    attorneyRegionFilter.addEventListener(\"change\", function () {\n      void refreshAttorneyResults();\n    });\n\n    if (resetLink) {\n      resetLink.addEventListener(\"click\", function (event) {\n        event.preventDefault();\n        if (attorneyFiltersLoading) {\n          return;\n        }\n\n        attorneyCountryFilter.value = \"\";\n        attorneyRegionFilter.value = \"\";\n        updateAttorneyRegionOptions();\n        attorneyFiltersPanel.hidden = true;\n        updateAttorneyFiltersToggle();\n        void refreshAttorneyResults();\n      });\n    }\n  }\n\n  window.activateTab = function (selectedTab) {\n    const targetPanel = document.getElementById(selectedTab.getAttribute(\"aria-controls\"));\n    if (!targetPanel) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    tabPanels.forEach((panel) => {\n      panel.hidden = true;\n      panel.style.display = \"none\";\n      panel.classList.remove(\"active\");\n    });\n\n    tabs.forEach((tab) => {\n      tab.setAttribute(\"aria-selected\", \"false\");\n      tab.classList.remove(\"active\");\n    });\n\n    selectedTab.setAttribute(\"aria-selected\", \"true\");\n    selectedTab.classList.add(\"active\");\n    targetPanel.hidden = false;\n    targetPanel.style.display = \"block\";\n    targetPanel.classList.add(\"active\");\n\n    updatePlaceholder();\n    handleSearchInput();\n  };\n\n  tabs.forEach((tab) => {\n    tab.addEventListener(\"click\", function (event) {\n      const clickedTab = event.currentTarget;\n      const stickyShell = document.querySelector(\".directory-sticky-shell\");\n      const directoryTabs = document.querySelector(\".directory-tabs\");\n      const isStickyActiveTabClick =\n        clickedTab.classList.contains(\"active\") &&\n        ((stickyShell && stickyShell.classList.contains(\"is-sticky\")) ||\n          (directoryTabs && directoryTabs.classList.contains(\"is-sticky\")));\n\n      if (isStickyActiveTabClick) {\n        const prefersReducedMotion = window.matchMedia(\"(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)\")\n          .matches;\n        window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: prefersReducedMotion ? \"auto\" : \"smooth\" });\n        return;\n      }\n\n      window.activateTab(clickedTab);\n    });\n stickyShell?.classList.toggle(\"is-sticky\", isSticky);\n        directoryTabs?.classList.toggle(\"is-sticky\", isSticky);\n        searchBox?.classList.toggle(\"is-sticky\", isSticky);\n      }\n }\\n\\n  if (attorneyFiltersToggle && attorneyFiltersPanel) {\\n    updateAttorneyFiltersToggle();\\n    attorneyFiltersToggle.addEventListener(\\"click\\", function () {\\n !attorneyFiltersPanel) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const isExpanded = !attorneyFiltersPanel.hidden;\n    attorneyFiltersToggle.setAttribute(\"aria-expanded\", isExpanded ? \"true\" : \"false\");\n searchInput.placeholder = \"Search SecureDrop instances...\";\n      return;\n    }\n\n    searchInput.placeholder = \"Search directory...\";\n  }\n\n  function scopeLabel() {\n    const activeTab = === \"globaleaks\") {\n      return \"GlobaLeaks instances\";\n    }\n\n    if (activeTab === \"securedrop\") {\n      return \"SecureDrop instances\";\n    }\n\n    return \"directory entries\";\n  }\n\n  function matchesTab(user, tab) {\n    if (\n      tab === \"verified\" &&\n      (!user.is_verified || user.is_public_record || user.is_globaleaks || user.is_securedrop)\n    ) {\n      return false;\n    }\n\n    if (tab === \"public-records\" && !user.is_public_record) {\n      return false;\n    }\n\n    if (tab === \"globaleaks\" && !user.is_globaleaks) {\n      return false;\n    }\n\n    if (tab === \"securedrop\" && !user.is_securedrop) {\n      return false;\n    }\n\n    return true;\n  }\n\n  function filterUsers(query, tab = activeTabName()) {\n    const normalizedQuery = query.trim().toLowerCase();\n\n    return userData.filter((user) => {\n      if (!matchesTab(user, tab)) {\n        return false;\n      }\n\n      if (normalizedQuery === \"\") {\n        return true;\n      }\n\n      const countries = Array.isArray(user.countries) ? user.countries.join(\" \") : \"\";\n      const searchText = userSearch.normalizeSearchText([\n        user.primary_username,\n        user.display_name,\n        user.bio,\n        user.city,\n        user.country,\n        user.subdivision,\n        countries,\n      ]);\n      return userSearch.matchesQuery(searchText, normalizedQuery);\n    });\n  }\n\n  function highlightMatch(text, query) {\n    return userSearch.highlightQuery(text || \"\", query);\n  }\n\n  function sortedByDisplayName(entries) {\n    return [...entries].sort((a, b) =>\n      (a.display_name || \"\").localeCompare(b.display_name || \"\", undefined, {\n        sensitivity: \"base\",\n      }),\n    );\n  }\n\n  function buildBadges(user, tab) {\n    let badgeContainer = \"\";\n\n    if (user.is_public_record) {\n      if (tab === \"all\") {\n        badgeContainer +=\n          '<span class=\"badge\" role=\"img\" aria-label=\"Attorney listing\">⚖️ Attorney</span>';\n      }\n      if (user.is_automated) {\n        badgeContainer +=\n          '<span class=\"badge\" role=\"img\" aria-label=\"Automated listing\">🤖 Automated</span>';\n      }\n      return badgeContainer;\n    }\n\n    if (user.is_securedrop) {\n      if (tab !== \"securedrop\") {\n        badgeContainer +=\n          '<span class=\"badge\" role=\"img\" aria-label=\"SecureDrop listing\">🛡️ SecureDrop</span>';\n      }\n      if (user.is_automated) {\n        badgeContainer +=\n          '<span class=\"badge\" role=\"img\" aria-label=\"Automated listing\">🤖 Automated</span>';\n      }\n      return badgeContainer;\n    }\n\n    if (user.is_globaleaks) {\n      if (tab !== \"globaleaks\") {\n        badgeContainer +=\n          '<span class=\"badge\" role=\"img\" aria-label=\"GlobaLeaks listing\">🌐 GlobaLeaks</span>';\n      }\n      if (user.is_automated) {\n        badgeContainer +=\n          '<span class=\"badge\" role=\"img\" aria-label=\"Automated listing\">🤖 Automated</span>';\n      }\n      return badgeContainer;\n    }\n\n    if (user.is_admin) {\n      badgeContainer +=\n        '<span class=\"badge\" role=\"img\" aria-label=\"Administrator account\">⚙️ Admin</span>';\n    }\n\n    if (user.is_verified) {\n      badgeContainer +=\n        '<span class=\"badge\" aria-label=\"Info-only account\">📇 Info Only</span>';\n    }\n\n    return badgeContainer;\n  }\n\n  function buildAutomatedListingCard(user, query, tab) {\n    const displayNameHighlighted = highlightMatch(user.display_name, query);\n    const bioHighlighted = user.bio ? highlightMatch(user.bio, query) : \"\";\n    let listingType = \"SecureDrop listing\";\n    if (user.is_public_record) {\n      listingType = \"Public record listing\";\n    } else if (user.is_globaleaks) {\n      listingType = \"GlobaLeaks listing\";\n    }\n\n    return `\n      <article class=\"user\" href=\"${user.profile_url}\" aria-label=\"View read-only listing for ${user.display_name}\">View Listing</a>\n        </div>\n      </article>\n    `;\n  }\n\n  function buildUserCard(user, query, tab) {\n    const displayNameHighlighted = highlightMatch(\n      user.display_name || user.primary_username,\n      query,\n    );\n    const usernameHighlighted = highlightMatch(user.primary_username, query);\n    const bioHighlighted = user.bio ? highlightMatch(user.bio, query) : \"\";\n\n    if (user.is_public_record || user.is_globaleaks || user.is_securedrop) {\n      return buildAutomatedListingCard(user, query, tab);\n    }\n\n    const isVerified = user.is_verified ? \"Verified\" : \"\";\n    const userType = user.is_admin ? `${isVerified} admin user` : `${isVerified} User`;\n    const badges = buildBadges(user, tab);\n\n    return `\n      <article class=\"user\" aria-label=\"${userType}, Display name:${user.display_name || user.primary_username}, Username: ${user.primary_username}, Bio: ${user.bio || \"No bio\"}\">\n        <h3>${displayNameHighlighted}</h3>\n        <p class=\"meta\">@${usernameHighlighted}</p>\n        ${badges ? `<div class=\"badgeContainer\">${badges}</div>` : \"\"}\n        ${bioHighlighted ? `<p class=\"bio\">${bioHighlighted}</p>` : \"\"}\n        <div class=\"user-actions\">\n          <a href=\"${user.profile_url}\" aria-label=\"${user.display_name || user.primary_username}'s profile\">View Profile</a>\n        </div>\n      </article>\n    `;\n  }\n\n  function appendSection(panel, label, users, query, tab) {\n    if (!users.length) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (label) {\n      const sectionLabel = document.createElement(\"p\");\n      sectionLabel.className = \"label userListContainer.className = \"user-list\";\n    userListContainer.innerHTML = users.map((user) => buildUserCard(user, query, tab)).join(\"\");\n    panel.appendChild(userListContainer);\n  }\n\n  function renderPanelContent(\n    panel,\n    users,\n    query,\n    tab,\n    { introMarkup = \"\", showEmptyMessage = true } = {},\n  ) {\n    panel.innerHTML = introMarkup;\n\n    if (users.length === 0) {\n      if (showEmptyMessage) {\n        panel.insertAdjacentHTML(\n          \"beforeend\",\n          '<p class=\"empty-message\"><span class=\"emoji-message\">🫥</span><br>No users withPgp = realUsers.filter((user) => user.has_pgp_key);\n    const infoOnly = realUsers.filter((user) => !user.has_pgp_key);\n\n    if (tab === \"all\") {\n      appendSection(panel, \"\", sortedByDisplayName(users), query, tab);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (tab === \"verified\") {\n      appendSection(panel, \"\", withPgp, query, tab);\n      appendSection(panel, \"📇 Info-Only Accounts\", infoOnly, query, tab);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    appendSection(panel, \"\", users, query, tab);\n  }\n\n  function displayUsers(users, query) {\n    const panel = activePanel();\n    const tab = activeTabName();\n    if (!panel) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    renderPanelContent(panel, users, query, tab);\n  }\n\n  function buildDefaultPanelMarkup(tab) {\n    const panel = document.createElement(\"div\");\n    const introMarkup = tab === \"public-records\" ? publicRecordsIntroMarkup : \"\";\n    const showEmptyMessage = tab !== \"public-records\";\n\n    renderPanelContent(panel, filterUsers(\"\", tab), \"\", tab, {\n      introMarkup,\n      showEmptyMessage,\n    });\n\n    return panel.innerHTML;\n  }\n\n  function refreshInitialMarkup() {\n    if (document.getElementById(\"public-records\")) {\n      initialMarkup.set(\"public-records\", buildDefaultPanelMarkup(\"public-records\"));\n    }\n\n    if (document.getElementById(\"all\")) {\n      initialMarkup.set(\"all\", buildDefaultPanelMarkup(\"all\"));\n    }\n  }\n\n  function handleSearchInput() {\n    const query = searchInput.value.trim();\n    const panel = activePanel();\n    const currentScopeLabel = scopeLabel();\n    const hasQuery = query.length > 0;\n\n    if (clearIcon) {\n      clearIcon.style.visibility = hasQuery ? \"visible\" : \"hidden\";\n      clearIcon.hidden = !hasQuery;\n      clearIcon.setAttribute(\"aria-hidden\", hasQuery ? \"false\" : \"true\");\n    }\n\n    if (query.length === 0) {\n      if (panel && initialMarkup.has(panel.id)) {\n        panel.innerHTML = initialMarkup.get(panel.id);\n      }\n      if (hasRenderedSearch) {\n        setSearchStatus(`Showing all ${currentScopeLabel}.`);\n      }\n      hasRenderedSearch = false;\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const filteredUsers = filterUsers(query);\n    displayUsers(filteredUsers, query);\n    setSearchStatus(\n      filteredUsers.length === 1\n        ? `Found 1 ${currentScopeLabel.slice(0, -1)} matching \"${query}\".`\n        : `Found ${filteredUsers.length} ${currentScopeLabel} matching \"${query}\".`,\n    );\n    hasRenderedSearch = true;\n  }\n\n  function buildAttorneyFilterSearch() {\n    const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);\n    const country = attorneyCountryFilter?.value.trim() || \"\";\n    const region = attorneyRegionFilter?.value.trim() || \"\";\n\n    if (country) {\n      params.set(\"country\", country);\n    } else {\n      params.delete(\"country\");\n    }\n\n    if (region) {\n      params.set(\"region\", region);\n    } else {\n      params.delete(\"region\");\n    }\n\n    const nextSearch = params.toString();\n    return nextSearch ? `?${nextSearch}` : \"\";\n  }\n\n  function applyAttorneyFiltersFromSearch(search) {\n    if (!attorneyCountryFilter || !attorneyRegionFilter) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const params = new URLSearchParams(search);\n    attorneyCountryFilter.value = params.get(\"country\") || \"\";\n    attorneyRegionFilter.value = params.get(\"region\") || \"\";\n    updateAttorneyRegionOptions();\n\n    if (attorneyFiltersPanel) {\n      attorneyFiltersPanel.hidden = !(attorneyCountryFilter.value || attorneyRegionFilter.value);\n      updateAttorneyFiltersToggle();\n    }\n  }\n\n  function setAttorneyFiltersLoadingState(isLoading) {\n    if (!attorneyFiltersPanel) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    attorneyFiltersLoading = isLoading;\n    attorneyFiltersPanel.setAttribute(\"aria-busy\", isLoading ? \"true\" : \"false\");\n\n    if (attorneyCountryFilter) {\n      attorneyCountryFilter.disabled = isLoading;\n    }\n\n    if (attorneyRegionFilter) {\n      const disabledByCountry = attorneyRegionFilter.dataset.disabledByCountry === \"true\";\n      attorneyRegionFilter.disabled = isLoading || disabledByCountry;\n    }\n\n    const submitButton = attorneyFiltersPanel.querySelector('button[type=\"submit\"]');\n    if (submitButton) {\n      submitButton.disabled = isLoading;\n    }\n\n    const resetLink = attorneyFiltersPanel.querySelector(\"a\");\n    if (resetLink) {\n      resetLink.setAttribute(\"aria-disabled\", isLoading ? \"true\" : \"false\");\n      resetLink.tabIndex = isLoading ? -1 : 0;\n    }\n  }\n\n  function updateAttorneyRegionOptions() {\n    if (!attorneyCountryFilter || !attorneyRegionFilter) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const selectedCountry = attorneyCountryFilter.value;\n    const selectedRegion = attorneyRegionFilter.value;\n    const availableRegions = Array.isArray(attorneyFilterMetadata.regions?.[selectedCountry])\n      ? attorneyFilterMetadata.regions[selectedCountry]\n      : [];\n\n    attorneyRegionFilter.innerHTML = '<option value=\"\">All</option>';\n\n    availableRegions.forEach((region) => {\n      const option = document.createElement(\"option\");\n      option.value = region.code;\n      option.textContent = region.label;\n      if (region.code === selectedRegion) {\n        option.selected = true;\n      }\n      attorneyRegionFilter.appendChild(option);\n    });\n\n    if (!availableRegions.some((region) => region.code === selectedRegion)) {\n      attorneyRegionFilter.value = \"\";\n    }\n\n    const disabledByCountry = !(selectedCountry && availableRegions.length);\n    attorneyRegionFilter.dataset.disabledByCountry = disabledByCountry ? \"true\" : \"false\";\n    attorneyRegionFilter.disabled = attorneyFiltersLoading || disabledByCountry;\n  }\n\n  function ensureAttorneyFilterMetadata() {\n    if (!attorneyCountryFilter || !attorneyRegionFilter) {\n      return Promise.resolve(null);\n    }\n\n    if (attorneyFilterMetadataRequest) {\n      return attorneyFilterMetadataRequest;\n    }\n\n    attorneyFilterMetadataRequest = fetch(`${pathPrefix}/directory/attorney-filters.json`)\n      .then((response) => {\n        if (!response.ok) {\n          throw new Error(\"Network response was not ok\");\n        }\n        return response.json();\n      })\n      .then((data) => {\n        attorneyFilterMetadata = data;\n        updateAttorneyRegionOptions();\n        return data;\n      })\n      .catch((error) => {\n        attorneyFilterMetadataRequest = null;\n        console.error(\"Failed to load attorney filter metadata:\", error);\n        return null;\n      });\n\n    return attorneyFilterMetadataRequest;\n  }\n\n  function setDirectoryUrl(search) {\n    window.history.replaceState(\n      {},\n      \"\",\n      `${window.location.pathname}${search}${window.location.hash}`,\n    );\n  }\n\n  function loadData(search = window.location.search, options = {}) {\n    const requestOptions = {};\n    if (options.signal) {\n      requestOptions.signal = options.signal;\n    }\n\n    return fetch(`${pathPrefix}/directory/users.json${search}`, requestOptions)\n      .then((response) => {\n        if (!response.ok) {\n          throw new Error(\"Network response was not ok\");\n        }\n        return response.json();\n      })\n      .then((data) => {\n        userData = data;\n        loadedDirectorySearch = search;\n        refreshInitialMarkup();\n        handleSearchInput();\n      });\n  }\n\n  function requestDirectoryData(search = window.location.search, options = {}) {\n    const { showAttorneyFilterLoadingState = false } = options;\n\n    if (directoryDataRequestController) {\n      directoryDataRequestController.abort();\n    }\n\n    const controller = new AbortController();\n    directoryDataRequestController = controller;\n\n    if (showAttorneyFilterLoadingState) {\n      setAttorneyFiltersLoadingState(true);\n    }\n\n    return loadData(search, { signal: controller.signal }).finally(() => {\n      if (directoryDataRequestController === controller) {\n        directoryDataRequestController = null;\n        if (showAttorneyFilterLoadingState) {\n          setAttorneyFiltersLoadingState(false);\n        }\n      }\n    });\n  }\n\n  async function refreshAttorneyResults() {\n    if (!attorneyFiltersPanel) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const nextSearch = buildAttorneyFilterSearch();\n    if (attorneyFiltersLoading || loadedDirectorySearch === nextSearch) {\n      return;\n    }\n    setSearchStatus(\"Updating attorney results.\");\n    setDirectoryUrl(nextSearch);\n\n    try {\n      await requestDirectoryData(nextSearch, { showAttorneyFilterLoadingState: true });\n      if (!searchInput.value.trim()) {\n        setSearchStatus(\"Attorney results updated.\");\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      if (error.name === \"AbortError\") {\n        return;\n      }\n\n      setDirectoryUrl(loadedDirectorySearch);\n      applyAttorneyFiltersFromSearch(loadedDirectorySearch);\n      setSearchStatus(\"Unable to update attorney results.\");\n      console.error(\"Failed to update attorney results:\", error);\n    }\n  }\n\n  if (searchInput) {\n    searchInput.addEventListener(\"input\", handleSearchInput);\n  }\n\n  if (clearIcon) {\n    clearIcon.addEventListener(\"click\", function () {\n      if (!searchInput) {\n        return;\n      }\n\n      searchInput.value = \"\";\n      clearIcon.style.visibility = \"hidden\";\n      clearIcon.hidden = true;\n      clearIcon.setAttribute(\"aria-hidden\", \"true\");\n      handleSearchInput();\n    });\n  }\n\n  if (attorneyFiltersToggle && attorneyFiltersPanel) {\n    updateAttorneyFiltersToggle();\n    attorneyFiltersToggle.addEventListener(\"click\", function () {\n      attorneyFiltersPanel.hidden = !attorneyFiltersPanel.hidden;\n      updateAttorneyFiltersToggle();\n    });\n  }\n\n  if (attorneyFiltersPanel && attorneyCountryFilter && attorneyRegionFilter) {\n    const resetLink = attorneyFiltersPanel.querySelector(\"a\");\n\n    attorneyFiltersPanel.addEventListener(\"submit\", function (event) {\n      event.preventDefault();\n      void refreshAttorneyResults();\n    });\n\n    attorneyCountryFilter.addEventListener(\"change\", async function () {\n      await ensureAttorneyFilterMetadata();\n      updateAttorneyRegionOptions();\n      void refreshAttorneyResults();\n    });\n\n    attorneyRegionFilter.addEventListener(\"change\", function () {\n      void refreshAttorneyResults();\n    });\n\n    if (resetLink) {\n      resetLink.addEventListener(\"click\", function (event) {\n        event.preventDefault();\n        if (attorneyFiltersLoading) {\n          return;\n        }\n\n        attorneyCountryFilter.value = \"\";\n        attorneyRegionFilter.value = \"\";\n        updateAttorneyRegionOptions();\n        attorneyFiltersPanel.hidden = true;\n        updateAttorneyFiltersToggle();\n        void refreshAttorneyResults();\n      });\n    }\n  }\n\n  window.activateTab = function (selectedTab) {\n    const targetPanel = document.getElementById(selectedTab.getAttribute(\"aria-controls\"));\n    if (!targetPanel) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    tabPanels.forEach((panel) => {\n      panel.hidden = true;\n      panel.style.display = \"none\";\n      panel.classList.remove(\"active\");\n    });\n\n    tabs.forEach((tab) => {\n      tab.setAttribute(\"aria-selected\", \"false\");\n      tab.classList.remove(\"active\");\n    });\n\n    selectedTab.setAttribute(\"aria-selected\", \"true\");\n    selectedTab.classList.add(\"active\");\n    targetPanel.hidden = false;\n    targetPanel.style.display = \"block\";\n    targetPanel.classList.add(\"active\");\n\n    updatePlaceholder();\n    handleSearchInput();\n  };\n\n  tabs.forEach((tab) => {\n    tab.addEventListener(\"click\", function (event) {\n      const clickedTab = event.currentTarget;\n      const stickyShell = document.querySelector(\".directory-sticky-shell\");\n      const directoryTabs = document.querySelector(\".directory-tabs\");\n      const isStickyActiveTabClick =\n attorneyFilterMetadata.regions[selectedCountry]\\n      : [];\\n\\n    attorneyRegionFilter.innerHTML = \'<option value=\\"\\">All</option>\';\\n\\n    availableRegions.forEach((region) => {\\n      const option = document.createElement(\\"option\\");\\n      option.value = region.code;\\n      option.textContent = region.label;\\n      if (region.code === selectedRegion) {\\n        option.selected = true;\\n      }\\n      attorneyRegionFilter.appendChild(option);\\n    });\\n\\n    if (!availableRegions.some((region) => region.code === selectedRegion)) {\\n      attorneyRegionFilter.value = \\"\\";\\n    }\\n\\n    const disabledByCountry = !(selectedCountry && availableRegions.length);\\n    attorneyRegionFilter.dataset.disabledByCountry = disabledByCountry ? \\"true\\" : \\"false\\";\\n    attorneyRegionFilter.disabled = attorneyFiltersLoading || disabledByCountry;\\n  }\\n\\n  function ensureAttorneyFilterMetadata() {\\n    if (!attorneyCountryFilter || !attorneyRegionFilter) {\\n      return Promise.resolve(null);\\n    }\\n\\n    if (attorneyFilterMetadataRequest) {\\n      return attorneyFilterMetadataRequest;\\n    }\\n\\n    attorneyFilterMetadataRequest = fetch(`${pathPrefix}/directory/attorney-filters.json`)\\n      .then((response) => {\\n        if (!response.ok) {\\n          throw new Error(\\"Network response was not ok\\");\\n        }\\n        return response.json();\\n      })\\n      .then((data) => {\\n        attorneyFilterMetadata = data;\\n        updateAttorneyRegionOptions();\\n        return data;\\n      })\\n      .catch((error) => {\\n        attorneyFilterMetadataRequest = null;\\n        console.error(\\"Failed to load attorney filter metadata:\\", error);\\n        return null;\\n      });\\n\\n    return attorneyFilterMetadataRequest;\\n  }\\n\\n  function setDirectoryUrl(search) {\\n    window.history.replaceState(\\n      {},\\n      \\"\\",\\n      `${window.location.pathname}${search}${window.location.hash}`,\\n    );\\n  }\\n\\n  function loadData(search = window.location.search, options = {}) {\\n    const requestOptions = {};\\n    if (options.signal) {\\n      requestOptions.signal = options.signal;\\n    }\\n\\n    return fetch(`${pathPrefix}/directory/users.json${search}`, requestOptions)\\n      .then((response) => {\\n {}) {\\n    const { showAttorneyFilterLoadingState = false } = options;\\n\\n    if (directoryDataRequestController) {\\n      directoryDataRequestController.abort();\\n    }\\n\\n    const controller = new AbortController();\\n    directoryDataRequestController = controller;\\n\\n    if (showAttorneyFilterLoadingState) {\\n      setAttorneyFiltersLoadingState(true);\\n    }\\n\\n    return (showAttorneyFilterLoadingState) {\\n          setAttorneyFiltersLoadingState(false);\\n        }\\n      }\\n    });\\n  }\\n\\n  async function refreshAttorneyResults() {\\n    if (!attorneyFiltersPanel) {\\n      return;\\n    }\\n\\n    const nextSearch = buildAttorneyFilterSearch();\\n    if (attorneyFiltersLoading || loadedDirectorySearch === nextSearch) {\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    setSearchStatus(\\"Updating attorney results.\\");\\n    setDirectoryUrl(nextSearch);\\n\\n    try {\\n      await requestDirectoryData(nextSearch, { showAttorneyFilterLoadingState: true });\\n      if (!searchInput.value.trim()) {\\n        setSearchStatus(\\"Attorney results updated.\\");\\n      }\\n    } catch (error) {\\n      if (error.name === \\"AbortError\\") {\\n        return;\\n      }\\n\\n      setDirectoryUrl(loadedDirectorySearch);\\n      applyAttorneyFiltersFromSearch(loadedDirectorySearch);\\n      setSearchStatus(\\"Unable }\\n\\n  if (attorneyFiltersToggle && attorneyFiltersPanel) {\\n    updateAttorneyFiltersToggle();\\n    attorneyFiltersToggle.addEventListener(\\"click\\", function () {\\n      attorneyFiltersPanel.hidden = !attorneyFiltersPanel.hidden;\\n      updateAttorneyFiltersToggle();\\n    });\\n  }\\n\\n  if (attorneyFiltersPanel && attorneyCountryFilter && attorneyRegionFilter) refreshAttorneyResults();\\n    });\\n\\n    attorneyCountryFilter.addEventListener(\\"change\\", async function () {\\n      await ensureAttorneyFilterMetadata();\\n      updateAttorneyRegionOptions();\\n      void refreshAttorneyResults();\\n    });\\n\\n    attorneyRegionFilter.addEventListener(\\"change\\", function () {\\n      void refreshAttorneyResults();\\n    });\\n\\n    if (resetLink) {\\n      resetLink.addEventListener(\\"click\\", function (event) {\\n        event.preventDefault();\\n        if (attorneyFiltersLoading) {\\n          return;\\n        }\\n\\n        attorneyCountryFilter.value = \\"\\";\\n        attorneyRegionFilter.value = \\"\\";\\n        updateAttorneyRegionOptions();\\n        attorneyFiltersPanel.hidden = true;\\n        updateAttorneyFiltersToggle();\\n        void refreshAttorneyResults();\\n      });\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  window.activateTab = function (selectedTab) {\\n    const targetPanel = tab.classList.remove(\\"active\\");\\n    });\\n\\n    selectedTab.setAttribute(\\"aria-selected\\", \\"true\\");\\n    selectedTab.classList.add(\\"active\\");\\n    targetPanel.hidden = false;\\n    targetPanel.style.display = \\"block\\";\\n    targetPanel.classList.add(\\"active\\");\\n\\n    updatePlaceholder();\\n    handleSearchInput();\\n  };\\n\\n  tabs.forEach((tab) => {\\n function setSearchStatus(message) {\n    if (searchStatus) {\n      searchStatus.textContent = message;\n    }\n  }\n\n  function updateAttorneyFiltersToggle() {\n    if (!attorneyFiltersToggle || !attorneyFiltersPanel) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const isExpanded = !attorneyFiltersPanel.hidden;\n    attorneyFiltersToggle.setAttribute(\"aria-expanded\", isExpanded ? \"true\" : \"false\");\n    attorneyFiltersToggle.textContent = isExpanded ? \"Hide Filters\" : \"Show Filters\";\n  }\n\n  function activeTabName() {\n    return searchInput.placeholder = \"Search SecureDrop instances...\";\n      return;\n    }\n\n    searchInput.placeholder = \"Search directory...\";\n  }\n\n  function scopeLabel() {\n    const activeTab = }\n\n  function matchesTab(user, tab) {\n    if (\n      tab === \"verified\" &&\n      (!user.is_verified || user.is_public_record || user.is_globaleaks || user.is_securedrop)\n    ) {\n      return false;\n    }\n\n    if (tab === \"public-records\" && !user.is_public_record) {\n      return false;\n    }\n\n    if (tab === \"globaleaks\" && !user.is_globaleaks) {\n      return false;\n    }\n\n    if (tab === \"securedrop\" && !user.is_securedrop) {\n      return false;\n    }\n\n    return true;\n  }\n\n  function filterUsers(query, tab = activeTabName()) {\n    const normalizedQuery = query.trim().toLowerCase();\n\n    return userData.filter((user) => {\n      if (!matchesTab(user, tab)) {\n        return false;\n      }\n\n      if (normalizedQuery === \"\") {\n        return true;\n      }\n\n      const countries = Array.isArray(user.countries) ? user.countries.join(\" \") : \"\";\n      const searchText = userSearch.normalizeSearchText([\n        user.primary_username,\n        user.display_name,\n        user.bio,\n        user.city,\n        user.country,\n        user.subdivision,\n        countries,\n      ]);\n      return userSearch.matchesQuery(searchText, normalizedQuery);\n    });\n  }\n\n  function highlightMatch(text, query) {\n    return userSearch.highlightQuery(text || \"\", query);\n  }\n\n  function sortedByDisplayName(entries) {\n    return [...entries].sort((a, b) =>\n      (a.display_name || \"\").localeCompare(b.display_name || \"\", undefined, {\n        sensitivity: \"base\",\n      }),\n    );\n  }\n\n  function buildBadges(user, tab) {\n    let badgeContainer = \"\";\n\n    if (user.is_public_record) {\n      if (tab === \"all\") {\n        badgeContainer +=\n          '<span class=\"badge\" role=\"img\" aria-label=\"Attorney listing\">⚖️ Attorney</span>';\n      }\n      if (user.is_automated) {\n        badgeContainer +=\n          '<span class=\"badge\" role=\"img\" aria-label=\"Automated listing\">🤖 Automated</span>';\n      }\n      return badgeContainer;\n    }\n\n    if (user.is_securedrop) {\n      if (tab !== \"securedrop\") {\n        badgeContainer +=\n          '<span class=\"badge\" role=\"img\" aria-label=\"SecureDrop listing\">🛡️ SecureDrop</span>';\n      }\n      if (user.is_automated) {\n        badgeContainer +=\n          '<span class=\"badge\" role=\"img\" aria-label=\"Automated listing\">🤖 Automated</span>';\n      }\n      return badgeContainer;\n    }\n\n    if (user.is_globaleaks) {\n      if (tab !== \"globaleaks\") {\n        badgeContainer +=\n          '<span class=\"badge\" role=\"img\" aria-label=\"GlobaLeaks listing\">🌐 GlobaLeaks</span>';\n      }\n      if (user.is_automated) {\n        badgeContainer +=\n          '<span class=\"badge\" role=\"img\" aria-label=\"Automated listing\">🤖 Automated</span>';\n      }\n      return badgeContainer;\n    }\n\n    if (user.is_admin) {\n      badgeContainer +=\n        '<span class=\"badge\" role=\"img\" aria-label=\"Administrator account\">⚙️ Admin</span>';\n    }\n\n    if (user.is_verified) {\n      badgeContainer +=\n        '<span class=\"badge\" role=\"img\" aria-label=\"Verified account\">⭐️ Verified</span>';\n    }\n\n    if (tab === \"all\" && !user.has_pgp_key) {\n      badgeContainer +=\n        '<span class=\"badge\" role=\"img\" aria-label=\"Info-only account\">📇 Info Only</span>';\n    }\n\n    return badgeContainer;\n  }\n\n  function buildAutomatedListingCard(user, query, tab) {\n    const displayNameHighlighted = highlightMatch(user.display_name, query);\n    const bioHighlighted = user.bio ? highlightMatch(user.bio, query) : \"\";\n    let listingType = \"SecureDrop listing\";\n    if (user.is_public_record) {\n      listingType = \"Public record listing\";\n    } else if (user.is_globaleaks) {\n      listingType = \"GlobaLeaks listing\";\n    }\n\n    return `\n      <article class=\"user\" aria-label=\"${listingType}, Display name:${user.display_name}, Description: ${user.bio || \"No description\"}\">\n        <h3>${displayNameHighlighted}</h3>\n        <div class=\"badgeContainer\">${buildBadges(user, tab)}</div>\n        ${bioHighlighted ? `<p class=\"bio\">${bioHighlighted}</p>` : \"\"}\n        <div class=\"user-actions\">\n          <a href=\"${user.profile_url}\" aria-label=\"View read-only listing for ${user.display_name}\">View Listing</a>\n        </div>\n      </article>\n    `;\n  }\n\n  function buildUserCard(user, query, tab) {\n    const displayNameHighlighted = highlightMatch(\n      user.display_name || user.primary_username,\n      query,\n    );\n    const usernameHighlighted = highlightMatch(user.primary_username, query);\n    const bioHighlighted = user.bio ? highlightMatch(user.bio, query) : \"\";\n\n    if (user.is_public_record || user.is_globaleaks || user.is_securedrop) {\n      return buildAutomatedListingCard(user, query, tab);\n    }\n\n    const isVerified = user.is_verified ? \"Verified\" : \"\";\n    const userType = user.is_admin ? `${isVerified} admin user` : `${isVerified} User`;\n    const badges = buildBadges(user, tab);\n\n    return `\n      <article class=\"user\" aria-label=\"${userType}, Display name:${user.display_name || user.primary_username}, Username: ${user.primary_username}, Bio: ${user.bio || \"No bio\"}\">\n        <h3>${displayNameHighlighted}</h3>\n        <p class=\"meta\">@${usernameHighlighted}</p>\n        ${badges ? `<div class=\"badgeContainer\">${badges}</div>` : \"\"}\n        ${bioHighlighted ? `<p class=\"bio\">${bioHighlighted}</p>` : \"\"}\n        <div class=\"user-actions\">\n          <a href=\"${user.profile_url}\" aria-label=\"${user.display_name || user.primary_username}'s profile\">View Profile</a>\n        </div>\n      </article>\n    `;\n  }\n\n  function appendSection(panel, label, users, query, tab) {\n    if (!users.length) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (label) {\n      const sectionLabel = document.createElement(\"p\");\n      sectionLabel.className = \"label searchLabel\";\n      sectionLabel.textContent = label;\n      panel.appendChild(sectionLabel);\n    }\n\n    const userListContainer = document.createElement(\"div\");\n    userListContainer.className = \"user-list\";\n    userListContainer.innerHTML = users.map((user) => buildUserCard(user, query, tab)).join(\"\");\n    panel.appendChild(userListContainer);\n  }\n\n  function renderPanelContent(\n    panel,\n    users,\n    query,\n    tab,\n    { introMarkup = \"\", showEmptyMessage = true } = {},\n  ) {\n    panel.innerHTML = introMarkup;\n\n    if (users.length === 0) {\n      if (showEmptyMessage) {\n        panel.insertAdjacentHTML(\n          \"beforeend\",\n          '<p class=\"empty-message\"><span class=\"emoji-message\">🫥</span><br>No users found.</p>',\n        );\n      }\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const realUsers = users.filter(\n      (user) => !user.is_public_record && !user.is_globaleaks && !user.is_securedrop,\n    );\n    const withPgp = realUsers.filter((user) => user.has_pgp_key);\n    const infoOnly = realUsers.filter((user) => !user.has_pgp_key);\n\n    if (tab === \"all\") {\n      appendSection(panel, \"\", sortedByDisplayName(users), query, tab);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (tab === \"verified\") {\n      appendSection(panel, \"\", withPgp, query, tab);\n      appendSection(panel, \"📇 Info-Only Accounts\", infoOnly, query, tab);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    appendSection(panel, \"\", users, query, tab);\n  }\n\n  function displayUsers(users, query) {\n    const panel = activePanel();\n    const tab = activeTabName();\n    if (!panel) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    renderPanelContent(panel, users, query, tab);\n  }\n\n  function buildDefaultPanelMarkup(tab) {\n    const panel = document.createElement(\"div\");\n    const introMarkup = tab === \"public-records\" ? publicRecordsIntroMarkup : \"\";\n    const showEmptyMessage = tab !== \"public-records\";\n\n    renderPanelContent(panel, filterUsers(\"\", tab), \"\", tab, {\n      introMarkup,\n      showEmptyMessage,\n    });\n\n    return panel.innerHTML;\n  }\n\n  function refreshInitialMarkup() {\n    if (document.getElementById(\"public-records\")) {\n      initialMarkup.set(\"public-records\", buildDefaultPanelMarkup(\"public-records\"));\n    }\n\n    if (document.getElementById(\"all\")) {\n      initialMarkup.set(\"all\", buildDefaultPanelMarkup(\"all\"));\n    }\n  }\n\n  function handleSearchInput() {\n    const query = searchInput.value.trim();\n    const panel = activePanel();\n    const currentScopeLabel = scopeLabel();\n    const hasQuery = query.length > 0;\n\n    if (clearIcon) {\n      clearIcon.style.visibility = hasQuery ? \"visible\" : \"hidden\";\n      clearIcon.hidden = !hasQuery;\n      clearIcon.setAttribute(\"aria-hidden\", hasQuery ? \"false\" : \"true\");\n    }\n\n    if (query.length === 0) {\n      if (panel && initialMarkup.has(panel.id)) {\n        panel.innerHTML = initialMarkup.get(panel.id);\n      }\n      if (hasRenderedSearch) {\n        setSearchStatus(`Showing all ${currentScopeLabel}.`);\n      }\n      hasRenderedSearch = false;\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const filteredUsers = filterUsers(query);\n    displayUsers(filteredUsers, query);\n    setSearchStatus(\n      filteredUsers.length === 1\n        ? `Found 1 ${currentScopeLabel.slice(0, -1)} matching \"${query}\".`\n        : `Found ${filteredUsers.length} ${currentScopeLabel} matching \"${query}\".`,\n    );\n    hasRenderedSearch = true;\n  }\n\n  function buildAttorneyFilterSearch() {\n    const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);\n    const country = attorneyCountryFilter?.value.trim() || \"\";\n    const region = attorneyRegionFilter?.value.trim() || \"\";\n\n    if (country) {\n      params.set(\"country\", country);\n    } else {\n      params.delete(\"country\");\n    }\n\n    if (region) {\n      params.set(\"region\", region);\n    } else {\n      params.delete(\"region\");\n    }\n\n    const nextSearch = params.toString();\n    return nextSearch ? `?${nextSearch}` : \"\";\n  }\n\n  function applyAttorneyFiltersFromSearch(search) {\n    if (!attorneyCountryFilter || !attorneyRegionFilter) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const params = new URLSearchParams(search);\n    attorneyCountryFilter.value = params.get(\"country\") || \"\";\n    attorneyRegionFilter.value = params.get(\"region\") || \"\";\n    updateAttorneyRegionOptions();\n\n    if (attorneyFiltersPanel) {\n      attorneyFiltersPanel.hidden = !(attorneyCountryFilter.value || attorneyRegionFilter.value);\n      updateAttorneyFiltersToggle();\n    }\n  }\n\n  function setAttorneyFiltersLoadingState(isLoading) {\n    if (!attorneyFiltersPanel) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    attorneyFiltersLoading = isLoading;\n    attorneyFiltersPanel.setAttribute(\"aria-busy\", isLoading ? \"true\" : \"false\");\n\n    if (attorneyCountryFilter) {\n      attorneyCountryFilter.disabled = isLoading;\n    }\n\n    if (attorneyRegionFilter) {\n      const disabledByCountry = attorneyRegionFilter.dataset.disabledByCountry === \"true\";\n      attorneyRegionFilter.disabled = isLoading || disabledByCountry;\n    }\n\n    const submitButton = attorneyFiltersPanel.querySelector('button[type=\"submit\"]');\n    if (submitButton) {\n      submitButton.disabled = isLoading;\n    }\n\n    const resetLink = attorneyFiltersPanel.querySelector(\"a\");\n    if (resetLink) {\n      resetLink.setAttribute(\"aria-disabled\", isLoading ? \"true\" : \"false\");\n      resetLink.tabIndex = isLoading ? -1 : 0;\n    }\n  }\n\n  function updateAttorneyRegionOptions() {\n    if (!attorneyCountryFilter || !attorneyRegionFilter) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const selectedCountry = attorneyCountryFilter.value;\n    const selectedRegion = attorneyRegionFilter.value;\n    const availableRegions = Array.isArray(attorneyFilterMetadata.regions?.[selectedCountry])\n      ? attorneyFilterMetadata.regions[selectedCountry]\n      : [];\n\n    attorneyRegionFilter.innerHTML = '<option value=\"\">All</option>';\n\n    availableRegions.forEach((region) => {\n      const option = document.createElement(\"option\");\n      option.value = region.code;\n      option.textContent = region.label;\n      if (region.code === selectedRegion) {\n        option.selected = true;\n      }\n      attorneyRegionFilter.appendChild(option);\n    });\n\n    if (!availableRegions.some((region) => region.code === selectedRegion)) {\n      attorneyRegionFilter.value = \"\";\n    }\n\n    const disabledByCountry = !(selectedCountry && availableRegions.length);\n    attorneyRegionFilter.dataset.disabledByCountry = disabledByCountry ? \"true\" : \"false\";\n    attorneyRegionFilter.disabled = attorneyFiltersLoading || disabledByCountry;\n  }\n\n  function ensureAttorneyFilterMetadata() {\n    if (!attorneyCountryFilter || !attorneyRegionFilter) {\n      return Promise.resolve(null);\n    }\n\n    if (attorneyFilterMetadataRequest) {\n      return attorneyFilterMetadataRequest;\n    }\n\n    attorneyFilterMetadataRequest = fetch(`${pathPrefix}/directory/attorney-filters.json`)\n      .then((response) => {\n        if (!response.ok) {\n          throw new Error(\"Network response was not ok\");\n        }\n        return response.json();\n      })\n      .then((data) => {\n        attorneyFilterMetadata = data;\n        updateAttorneyRegionOptions();\n        return data;\n      })\n      .catch((error) => {\n        attorneyFilterMetadataRequest = null;\n        console.error(\"Failed to load attorney filter metadata:\", error);\n        return null;\n      });\n\n    return attorneyFilterMetadataRequest;\n  }\n\n  function setDirectoryUrl(search) {\n    window.history.replaceState(\n      {},\n      \"\",\n      `${window.location.pathname}${search}${window.location.hash}`,\n    );\n  }\n\n  function loadData(search = window.location.search, options = {}) {\n    const requestOptions = {};\n    if (options.signal) {\n      requestOptions.signal = options.signal;\n    }\n\n    return fetch(`${pathPrefix}/directory/users.json${search}`, requestOptions)\n      .then((response) => {\n        if (!response.ok) {\n          throw new Error(\"Network response was not ok\");\n        }\n        return response.json();\n      })\n      .then((data) => {\n        userData = data;\n        loadedDirectorySearch = search;\n        refreshInitialMarkup();\n        handleSearchInput();\n      });\n  }\n\n  function requestDirectoryData(search = window.location.search, options = {}) {\n    const { showAttorneyFilterLoadingState = false } = options;\n\n    if (directoryDataRequestController) {\n      directoryDataRequestController.abort();\n    }\n\n    const controller = new AbortController();\n    directoryDataRequestController = controller;\n\n    if (showAttorneyFilterLoadingState) {\n      setAttorneyFiltersLoadingState(true);\n    }\n\n    return loadData(search, { signal: controller.signal }).finally(() => {\n      if (directoryDataRequestController === controller) {\n        directoryDataRequestController = null;\n        if (showAttorneyFilterLoadingState) {\n          setAttorneyFiltersLoadingState(false);\n        }\n      }\n    });\n  }\n\n  async function refreshAttorneyResults() {\n    if (!attorneyFiltersPanel) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const nextSearch = buildAttorneyFilterSearch();\n    if (attorneyFiltersLoading || loadedDirectorySearch === nextSearch) {\n      return;\n    }\n    setSearchStatus(\"Updating attorney results.\");\n    setDirectoryUrl(nextSearch);\n\n    try {\n (error) {\n      if (error.name === \"AbortError\") {\n        return;\n      }\n\n      setDirectoryUrl(loadedDirectorySearch);\n      applyAttorneyFiltersFromSearch(loadedDirectorySearch);\n      setSearchStatus(\"Unable to update attorney results.\");\n      console.error(\"Failed to update attorney results:\", error);\n    }\n  }\n\n  if (searchInput) {\n    searchInput.addEventListener(\"input\", handleSearchInput);\n  }\n\n  if (clearIcon) {\n    clearIcon.addEventListener(\"click\", function () {\n      if (!searchInput) {\n        return;\n      }\n\n      searchInput.value = \"\";\n      clearIcon.style.visibility = \"hidden\";\n      clearIcon.hidden = true;\n      clearIcon.setAttribute(\"aria-hidden\", \"true\");\n      handleSearchInput();\n    });\n  }\n\n  if (attorneyFiltersToggle && attorneyFiltersPanel) {\n    updateAttorneyFiltersToggle();\n    attorneyFiltersToggle.addEventListener(\"click\", function () {\n      attorneyFiltersPanel.hidden = !attorneyFiltersPanel.hidden;\n      updateAttorneyFiltersToggle();\n    });\n  }\n\n  if (attorneyFiltersPanel && attorneyCountryFilter && attorneyRegionFilter) {\n    const resetLink = attorneyFiltersPanel.querySelector(\"a\");\n\n    attorneyFiltersPanel.addEventListener(\"submit\", function (event) {\n      event.preventDefault();\n      void refreshAttorneyResults();\n    });\n\n    attorneyCountryFilter.addEventListener(\"change\", async function () {\n      await ensureAttorneyFilterMetadata();\n      updateAttorneyRegionOptions();\n      void refreshAttorneyResults();\n    });\n\n    attorneyRegionFilter.addEventListener(\"change\", function () {\n      void refreshAttorneyResults();\n    });\n\n    if (resetLink) {\n      resetLink.addEventListener(\"click\", function (event) {\n        event.preventDefault();\n        if (attorneyFiltersLoading) {\n          return;\n        }\n\n        attorneyCountryFilter.value = \"\";\n        attorneyRegionFilter.value = \"\";\n        updateAttorneyRegionOptions();\n        attorneyFiltersPanel.hidden = true;\n        updateAttorneyFiltersToggle();\n        void refreshAttorneyResults();\n      });\n    }\n  }\n\n  window.activateTab = function (selectedTab) {\n    const targetPanel = document.getElementById(selectedTab.getAttribute(\"aria-controls\"));\n    if (!targetPanel) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    tabPanels.forEach((panel) => {\n      panel.hidden = true;\n      panel.style.display = \"none\";\n      panel.classList.remove(\"active\");\n    });\n\n    tabs.forEach((tab) => {\n      tab.setAttribute(\"aria-selected\", \"false\");\n      tab.classList.remove(\"active\");\n    });\n\n    selectedTab.setAttribute(\"aria-selected\", \"true\");\n    selectedTab.classList.add(\"active\");\n    targetPanel.hidden = false;\n    targetPanel.style.display = \"block\";\n    targetPanel.classList.add(\"active\");\n\n    updatePlaceholder();\n    handleSearchInput();\n  };\n\n  tabs.forEach((tab) => {\n    tab.addEventListener(\"click\", function (event) {\n      const clickedTab = event.currentTarget;\n      const clickedTab.classList.contains(\"active\") &&\n        ((stickyShell && stickyShell.classList.contains(\"is-sticky\")) ||\n          (directoryTabs && directoryTabs.classList.contains(\"is-sticky\")));\n\n      if (isStickyActiveTabClick) {\n        const prefersReducedMotion = window.matchMedia(\"(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)\")\n          .matches;\n        window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: prefersReducedMotion ? \"auto\" : \"smooth\" });\n        return;\n      }\n\n      window.activateTab(clickedTab);\n    });\n    tab.addEventListener(\"keydown\", function (event) {\n      if (event.key !== \"ArrowLeft\" && event.key !== \"ArrowRight\") {\n        return;\n      }\n      event.preventDefault();\n      const tabArray = Array.from(tabs);\n      const currentIndex = tabArray.indexOf(event.currentTarget);\n      const direction = event.key === \"ArrowRight\" ? 1 : -1;\n      const nextIndex = (currentIndex + direction + tabArray.length) % tabArray.length;\n      const nextTab = tabArray[nextIndex];\n      if (nextTab) {\n        window.activateTab(nextTab);\n        nextTab.focus();\n      }\n    });\n bannerHeight;\n      const stickyAnchor = stickyShell || directoryTabs;\n\n      if (stickyAnchor) {\n        stickyAnchor.style.setProperty(\"--directory-sticky-top\", `${stickyTop}px`);\n stickyShell?.classList.toggle(\"is-sticky\", isSticky);\n        directoryTabs?.classList.toggle(\"is-sticky\", isSticky);\n        searchBox?.classList.toggle(\"is-sticky\", isSticky);\n      }\n
